title: Rename 'Favorite AT Location' label and fix 'Actor not available' error in Add Entry form

requirements.text: Rename the label 'Favorite AT Location' to 'Favorite Location on the Trail' everywhere it appears in the frontend, including in the AddEntryPage form, any placeholder or helper text, and any related labels in EntryDetailPage, GuestbookFeedPage, or other components.

quotes: Change "Favorite AT Location" to "Favorite Location on the Trail"

acceptanceCriteria: The string 'Favorite AT Location' no longer appears anywhere in the UI
The label 'Favorite Location on the Trail' is displayed wherever the favorite place field is referenced in the AddEntryPage form
All other locations (detail page, feed badges, dialogs) that previously showed 'Favorite AT Location' now show 'Favorite Location on the Trail'

requirements.text: Fix the 'Actor not available' error that occurs when a user attempts to add a location while signing the guest book. Investigate and resolve the actor initialization or availability check in the relevant mutation/query hooks (useQueries.ts, useActor.ts usage in AddEntryPage) so that the actor is properly awaited or re-fetched before the location submission is attempted.

quotes: When signing the guest book and adding a location, it reads, "Actor not available"

acceptanceCriteria: An authenticated user can add a location when signing the guest book without seeing any 'Actor not available' error
The add-entry form submission with a favorite location completes successfully and the entry appears in the feed with the location data
If the actor is not yet initialized, the UI shows an appropriate loading or login prompt rather than an error message

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Redesigning the Add Entry form layout
Changing any other AT-related labels beyond 'Favorite AT Location'
Modifying backend data models or stored entry schema
